description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MinGW that runs on push and workflow dispatch events. The workflow uses a Windows 2019 environment with a matrix strategy to build and test nCine with different compilers (GCC and Clang) and build types (Debug, Release, DevDist, and LuaDist). The workflow checks out the code, updates MSYS2, installs build dependencies, and then builds and tests nCine using CMake and Make. For DevDist and LuaDist build types, it packages the artifacts and pushes them to a public repository.
